blocks.text: Shivanjali
The Heart of Leo
9 August 2026
Shivanjali,
Thirty-five years ago, a light entered this world - one destined to bring warmth, grace, and an unforgettable kind of brilliance to everyone fortunate enough to cross its path.

Long before we ever met, your story was quietly unfolding beneath the very same sky. Mine was too. Neither of us knew it then, but across all those ordinary years, our paths were gently finding their way toward each other.

When they finally crossed, life became richer than either of us could have imagined. The dreams we once carried separately slowly became shared ones - and before we knew it, those dreams had tiny hands, an infectious laugh, and a name we will cherish forever: Nitvika.
Looking back, it is hard to imagine a time when our three lives weren't always meant to become one.

When I began thinking about your 35th birthday, I kept coming back to one simple thought: some gifts are opened once, but others become more meaningful every time you return to them. This is one of those gifts.
So today, I dedicate Regulus - the beating heart of Leo - to you.

Its light has travelled nearly eighty years across the cosmos just to reach us tonight. It was journeying through space before we met, before we built our life together, and before little Nitvika filled our home with laughter. Yet somehow, it feels as though it was always waiting for this exact moment to become part of our story.

Whenever life feels busy...
Whenever it feels overwhelming...
Whenever we're side by side...
Or even when miles apart...
I hope you'll pause and look up.
Somewhere in the heart of Leo, a light is shining that will always carry your name. And every time you find it, I hope it reminds you of what I will never stop feeling:

You have made my world brighter in ways you may never fully realize. Thank you for taking every ordinary day and quietly making it extraordinary. No matter where life takes us, you will always be the heart of mine.
Happy 35th Birthday, my love. May this little corner of the night sky always bring you back to this moment - and remind you just how deeply you are cherished.

Always under the same sky,
❤️ Harshit
Light that has already travelled seventy-nine years to reach us isn't going anywhere. It doesn't wilt, or fade, or lose its shimmer with time.
35 years of your story, and every chapter since has been watched over by a sky that was always waiting to celebrate you.

blocks.title: 1991 · The Original Light
blocks.description: 35 orbits ago, Shivanjali's journey began - bringing warmth, grace, and effortless brilliance into the world.

blocks.title: Her Own Trail
blocks.description: Building her own wisdom, her distinct laughter, her fierce soul, and the quiet strength she carries into every room.

blocks.title: Two Orbits Align
blocks.description: When two separate constellations crossed paths and linked forever - making my world infinitely brighter.

blocks.title: Our Little Light
blocks.description: Watching her step into motherhood with boundless love, filling our home with warmth and raising our little light.

blocks.title: 35th Orbit · Regulus
blocks.description: 35 revolutions around the sun. A star in the heart of Leo dedicated to an extraordinary woman forever.

blocks.text: Years from now, I hope you still look up, find this star, and remember that somewhere beneath the very same sky... someone loves you beyond words.
- Harshit
Find Our Star
